name: 13q22_KLF5_SD
description: 13q22.1 region containing KLF5/KLF12 paralog cluster. Small intra-chromosomal SDs (5-15 kb at 93-96% identity) flank KLF5 and contribute to rare intragenic events. The region is a fragile-site neighbour (FRA13E).

architecture.internal_structure: 5-15 kb SD pairs at 93-96% identity flanking KLF5; KLF12 paralog 8 Mb distal.
